notes: England are without both first-choice RB Reece James (hamstring) and backup Jarell Quansah (ankle), forcing uncapped Djed Spence into a starting role at right-back; Bukayo Saka started on the bench as Tuchel manages his fitness. DR Congo report no injury concerns and are at full strength for their historic first-ever World Cup knockout fixture.
home_scorers: Harry Kane (leading striker, England all-time top WC scorer with 11 goals)
Jude Bellingham (midfield goal threat, joint-top scorer for England in tournamen
Marcus Rashford (wide forward, scored vs Croatia, dangerous in transition)
away_scorers: Yoane Wissa (leading striker, scored 3 of DR Congo's 4 WC goals, 1 goal per 90 m
Cédric Bakambu (experienced forward, set-piece and hold-up threat)
Brian Cipenga (dynamic winger, completed 6 dribbles on WC debut vs Uzbekistan)
